article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral language, attributes claims, and avoids adopting loaded framing. It reflects the article’s fact-check posture without asserting contested claims as facts. Minor omission: it doesn’t list Trump/campaign as a represented perspective.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs and descriptions; no charged phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Notes lack of evidence and attributes findings to CNN and experts; avoids asserting unproven outcomes.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: The line about treating claims with skepticism is consistent with the article’s evidence, slightly prescriptive but justified.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No inferences about intent or beliefs.
custom_reasoning.slant: Accurately reflects the fact-check and mentions both anti- and pro-immigration sources’ lack of corroboration.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Does not list Trump/campaign as a perspective in sources_represented despite summarizing his claims.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives like ‘unverified’ and ‘unsubstantiated’ are factual characterizations.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced; includes caveat that fabrication isn’t definitively proven.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats all cited sources similarly; no undue deference.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the opinion framing; avoids declaring the claim false outright.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures multiple organizations but omits Trump/campaign as a listed perspective.
